name: Alibaba Cloud ESA MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Alibaba Cloud (aliyun org) for ESA (Edge Security Accelerator) — Alibaba's edge computing, CDN, and web security platform. Enables AI agents to manage edge site configurations, CDN rules, WAF policies, DDoS protection, and DNS settings through Alibaba Cloud's ESA API.
use_cases: Managing CDN and edge configurations on Alibaba Cloud from DevOps agents
Configuring WAF security rules and DDoS protection policies from security agents
Updating DNS and edge routing configurations from infrastructure automation agents
Monitoring and adjusting edge performance settings via AI operations workflows
not_for: Teams not using Alibaba Cloud ESA (platform-specific)
Cloudflare, AWS CloudFront, or other CDN/edge users
best_when: An enterprise using Alibaba Cloud ESA for edge computing and security wants AI agents to automate CDN management, WAF tuning, and edge configuration tasks.
avoid_when: You use other CDN/edge providers. Also: ESA data residency in Alibaba Cloud CN/AP regions — review compliance requirements.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID and Secret. Use RAM roles with least-privilege ESA permissions for agent access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: ESA is a paid Alibaba Cloud service
pricing.paid_tiers: ESA pricing by traffic, requests, and feature tier
pricing.notes: Alibaba Cloud account and ESA subscription required. MCP server is free open source from aliyun org.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: ESA API documentation primarily in Chinese — international users may face translation challenges
WAF and security rule changes have immediate production effects — test in staging first
Official from aliyun org — quality Alibaba Cloud implementation
Data residency in Alibaba Cloud CN/AP regions — review for regulatory compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Official Alibaba Cloud. HTTPS. RAM roles for access control. Security configuration changes have immediate production impact — restrict agent permissions to read-only unless write explicitly needed.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Official Alibaba Cloud. RAM roles. Security config changes affect production — use least privilege.
